honest_caveats: Measured from a Mac in EDT against Supabase. User-to-region network latency varies.
Edge Function cold starts add ~200-400ms to first request after idle. We warm with 3 calls before measuring.
Postgres connections are not pooled; each request opens a new connection.
FastAPI rewrite in progress — target sub-150ms wall P50.
interpretation: Server P50 ~300ms is the Edge Function + Postgres roundtrip. Wall P50 ~930ms includes the network from user to Supabase and back. The kernel work itself (BoW + BM25 + GIN search) is ~50-100ms — the rest is deployment overhead. FastAPI on a persistent host with connection pooling should cut server P50 to ~50-80ms and wall P50 to ~100-150ms.
